x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Active HR services (sn_hr_core_service) define the structured service catalog Now Assist HRSD uses for AI-guided employee lifecycle support including onboarding, offboarding, and lifecycle events. A well-populated HR service catalog is foundational for Now Assist routing and self-service.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure HR services for key lifecycle events (onboarding, offboarding, leave, benefits, payroll) via sn_hr_core_service_list.do. Target: 10+ active HR services. Now Assist HRSD uses the service catalog for AI-guided employee lifecycle management.
